_meta.engine: Python / Pygame  (port to Phaser.js / Three.js planned)
_meta.style: Pixel art — oblique-3D, Flemish ribbon-development aesthetic
_meta.scale: 1 game-pixel = 1 px; render at 1× then integer-upscale in engine

conventions.naming: snake_case — e.g. player_idle_01.png. No spaces, no CamelCase.
conventions.format: .png for exports (lossless + alpha). .svg for source vectors. No .jpg.
conventions.atlas_pad: 2 px between frames to prevent texture-bleed
conventions.raw_policy: Working files (.aseprite, .psd, .kra) go in raw_assets/ ONLY — never imported into game

folder_structure.raw_assets/: Reference images + source art files. Never imported by engine.
folder_structure.environment/tilesets/: 48×48 ground tiles: road, sidewalk, tram, crossing.
folder_structure.environment/props/: Lamp posts, trees, benches, bins, bollards, signs.
folder_structure.ui/: HUD panels, dialogue box, icons, font sheet.
folder_structure.fx/: Particle effects: coin sparkle, dust, tram sparks.

player_youssef.notes: Youssef — protagonist, Borgerhout resident. Red helmet matches shirt.

npc_sheet.layout: 4 columns × 2 rows  |  each cell ≈ 80×200 SVG px (4× scale)

npcs.notes: Older lady with shopping cart. Slow.

todo: npc_hijab_woman.svg  — Woman in hijab, modest abaya
npc_delivery.svg     — Delivery rider in orange vest

doors_open.desc: At stop, doors open 8 px outward

tram_delijn.notes: De Lijn type 7000/7900. Route 10 Wijnegem shown.

todo.notes: De Lijn city bus — green/white livery, 3 windows, 2 doors

styles.notes: Late-19th-c Antwerp eclectic: cornice, pilasters, arched windows
Red brick stepped gable — most common on Turnhoutsebaan
Rare art-nouveau: cast-iron balcony, curved lintels

real_shops.notes: Source of truth for real Herentalsebaan building appearances

entries.name: Budget Market
entries.facade: red brick, 4 stories, wide red awning

entries.facade: ochre, teal shutters, Arabic + Dutch sign

entries.name: Nacht Winkel
entries.facade: dark grey, neon signage, always lit

entries.name: Bakkerij Charif
entries.facade: cream, yellow awning, bread in window

entries.name: New Star Kebab
entries.facade: terracotta, red awning, doner rotating sign

raw_assets._policy: Source / reference files only. Never imported by engine. Keep in version control via Git LFS.
